description: ☞About Us: ★LeciRoba always persists in “Integrity-centered,Quality first and satisfactory services”. ☞About the Product: ★Cartridge Model: LeciRoba 219A for HP W2190A toner for Color LaserJet Pro MFP 3302FDW 3302SDW 3302FDN 3302FDNG 3302FDWG 3302SDWG Color LaserJet Pro 3202DN 3202DW (with chip,1-Pack) ★Application Scenes：LeciRoba W1290A 219A toner cartridges are Designed for SOHO users. ★High Quality：Equivalent to original quality. ★Good Price: It is worth the money. ☞Printer Compatible: ★Color LaserJet Pro MFP 3302FDW 3302SDW 3302FDN 3302FDNG 3302FDWG 3302SDWG ★Color LaserJet Pro 3202DN 3202DW ☞Package Contents: ★1 x Pack LeciRoba 219A/W2190A Black Toner cartridge ☞Instruction Manual: ★Please don't touch the chip, if you touch the chip accidentally, wipe it with an eraser. ★If a message like "Not Original" is displayed, please click "Yes" or "Next" to allow the printer to continue working. ★If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us directly by sending message, we will reply to you as soon as possible.
